title: Bandanas
description: Adds 16 coloured cosmetic bandanas with unique textures!
body:
# Bandanas

![(From left to right) Zuri wearing a Pink Bandana, Makena wearing a Yellow Bandana, Efe wearing a Black Bandana, Noor weraing a Green Bandana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uUwzOtPs/images/e1c46b1a7b2b8f079ad6e7650a7fc1302f18dd24.png)

# ✅ Features
- **Variety** through 16 uniquely textured bandanas, crafted from the 16 wool colours.
- **Purely Cosmetic** to add flair to your character, perfect for those exploring the Desert or fighting Bogged in the Swamp.
- **Craftable** through 3 Wool and 2 String, arranged like a Helmet.
- **Compatible with other mods** like Cosmetic Armor!

# 🧶 Recipe
![The crafting recipe for a Red Bandana: 3 Red Wool across the top row, 2 String on the left and right of the middle row results in 1 Red Bandana in the output slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uUwzOtPs/images/0f90cd45b5e5470434d9f83cd27412b1dbdda9aa.png)
